strategy: Life boss (3660) that is stunable and beguilable. Hit with Death (+30%); never Life (60% resist).
He drops a -30% Weakness on everyone at the start and again every 3rd round. Carry a Cleanse Charm or over-blade so the weakness does not gut your hit.
Clear the Brume Goblin or AoE both, stack blades, and land a Death hit. He is low health.
cheatNotes: He puts a -30% Weakness on all wizards on round 1 and every 3rd round after. Cleanse it before your big hit, or stack extra blades to cover the loss.
